title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind and University of Cambridge researchers apply AI tools to analyze bacterial resistance mechanisms. They use AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to compress years of structural biology work into minutes to identify drug-resistant bacteria defenses.
